overview: Just three months ago, a friend invited me to a girls' bar, and I casually wandered into it. I fell in love at first sight with Kanna, who worked there. Her slightly sulky expression, slender figure, and beautiful waist-length black hair all pierced my heart. I vowed to myself that I'd definitely have sex with her... and I remember a burning passion igniting within me. After three months of frequenting Galva, I finally managed to have dinner with her alone! All that was left was to fully utilize the skills I'd developed over the course of my life to lure girls back to my place. ...What? Tell me those skills? That's more than Chat G●T's top plan, which costs 30,000 yen a month! Lol. Well, if I had to give you a hint, maybe it was alcohol? ...But that's it! Lol. But it all comes down to building a relationship of trust over a long period of time without any ulterior motives. That's all it comes down to, and how many more times I keep going to the bar. It's a small price to pay if I can get such a cute girl. Also, if I can get her to have sex, my techniques mean there's no way it'll end in a one-night stand, and our sex-friend relationship will last for years, so I'll definitely be able to recoup my initial investment. Plus, from now on, women will be the ones to come to me, seeking my body and techniques, so it's a guaranteed win! Lol
